question:
Your engine runs a pump when you are delivering compressed gas. After finishing the delivery, when should you turn off the engine?
1) Leave it on the entire time.
2) Turn it off after unhooking the hoses.
3) Turn it off on arrival; use other power to run the pump.
4) Turn it off before unhooking the hoses.
canonical_answer: Turn it off before unhooking the hoses.

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: Turn it off before unhooking the hoses.

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: Turn it off before unhooking the hoses.

appears_in.title: Hazmat Test Nj
appears_in.answer: Turn it off before unhooking the hoses.

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: Turn it off before unhooking the hoses.

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Test Answers
appears_in.answer: Turn it off before unhooking the hoses.
